feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Gateway (OData)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Gateway (OData) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Use BTP Malware Service with VSCAN (VSI) - Detect hidden code in metadata of image file
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement where we need to scan files uploaded via a Fiori application for malware (in our case attachments for a leave request). After some research I came across this amazing github project ( https://github.com/gregorwolf/sap-malware-scanning-vsi ) that explains how you can use the BTP malware service via the VSI BAdI to do your virus/malware scanning. 

We initiated the BTP Malware instance, created the SM59 config, created all the classes and interfaces as per the github project, implemented the BADI and created the basic VSI configuration. 

 

 

 

Now that all seems to be working correctly. When I use VSCANTEST with the standard Eicar test virus, it correctly detects the virus.

However when I try something more complex like hiding executable PHP code within the metadata of an image file, it does not detect this as malware :(. I tried searching through all available documentation, and it seems as if the VSI profile configuration options where you specify MIME types for active content is only if you configure a malware service via VSI and not when you use the BADI?

Has anyone tried this before where you use the VSI BADI to call a malware scanning service (Like the BTP one) and scan for things like PHP code in metadata? How I do that?

Kind Regards

Deon

entry.title: How to activate OData API on SAP ECC R3
entry.content:
Hello SAP Specialists

We want to use API_ATTACHMENT_SRV on SAP ECC, but so far on our SAP ECC system no OData API has been activated or used so far. primary mode of interface so far are IDocs, files, BAPIs for this system.

Since OData API is to be activated which has never been done so far on this system, could you please help me with the pre-requisites?

SAP NetWeaver Gateway is available on the system, software component SAP_GWFND too is available on the system on the list of installed software.

 

Regards,

GP

entry.title: 12 characters limit on UserID in SU01
entry.content:
We are not able increase the 12 character limit on UserID created in SU01. it is not accepting UserID longer than 12 characters.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: PATCH operation failed on API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am going to update two fields one from header i.e "PurchaseOrderByCustomer"  and another from Item "RequestedQuantity".
These two fields available in A_SalesOrderItem EntitySet. But when I am doing PATCH operation only "RequestedQuantity" is updating not "PurchaseOrderByCustomer". 

I am using  url 
/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrderItem(SalesOrder='7000000223',SalesOrderItem='0010')

{

    "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "Alex",

    "RequestedQuantity": "20"

}

Is it not possible to update header field from item ? Is $batch operation work on this API ?

Can you please help me on this?

entry.title: Dynamic programming in RAP for excel upload
entry.content:
Hello All, 

We have a requirement to have a single interface in RAP, which can upload excel data to around 30 tables that we select via drop-down or screen. 

In the report program, we have an option upload excel to tables with dynamic programming with minimum efforts. We were achieving this by maintaining the tables in tvarvc, using the system classes and use Excel upload to populate the tables, and this would rarely require any enhancement.

Is there any way that we can do the same in RAP framework, as creating i view, c view. Meta data extension and behaviour definition for 30 tables is a tedious task.

Regards 

Naga

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver Gateway OAuth 2.0: avoid client secret / ABAP password for token call
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We’ve configured an OAuth 2.0 setup in our environment, but when calling the token endpoint it appears to require the client secret (and/or it’s being treated like an ABAP user password). We suspect this may be related to our SAP NetWeaver Gateway 7.50 SP30 level.

Goal: Identify the best-supported approach to obtain an access token without sending a client secret or ABAP user password in the token request.

Question:
Would using Client Credentials grant with client authentication set to “SSL client certificate” in transaction SOAUTH2 be the recommended approach? If not, what alternative approach would you recommend for this requirement?

If “SSL client certificate” is the right path, could someone share step-by-step configuration guidance, including:

  • Required settings in SOAUTH2 (grant type, client authentication, etc.)
  • Certificate prerequisites (where to import/maintain it, trust setup)
  • Any related ICF/service or Gateway configuration
  • How the token request should look once configured (high level)

Happy to provide additional details if needed .

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Fiori "My Inbox" Error - Intermittent issue,
entry.content:
Hello,

I encounter an issue in fiori " My Inbox". The error is intermittent (sometimes there's an error but sometimes it is working properly)


sample uri with error(sorry but I cannot post the whole URI):    /sap/opu/odata/IWPGW/TASKPROCESSING;v=2;mo/TaskCollection/$count/?$filter=Status%20eq%20%27READY%........

Method: GET

Status code: 500 after successful login, 400 after clicking the My Inbox with error

 

If the tile has error , this error message will appear

I think there's no issue in the configuration because sometimes it is working

The RFC Destination is NONE, and connection Type is "I" (Internal Connection)

the ZTASKPROCESSING we maintained in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and the taskprocessing maintained in SICF is activated

no dump in ST22

no duplicate keys/task 

but there is an error in /IWFND/ERROR_LOG and IWBEP/ERROR_LOG

Frontend - An exception was raised

Backend - Soapfaultcode: Authentication failed (not sure yet if this is the root cause)

FYI: we are using BPM for the workflow, the standard software version we used in /IWFND/ROUTING is /IWPGW/BPM, current system is ECC. The tasks in the "My Inbox" is coming from custom table

what could be the other possible cause of the intermittent error, any idea or anyone has experienced this kind of issue? or can you share your techniques on how to find the root cause of error

entry.title: High importance flag in outlook from ABAP for email using SO_DOCUMENT_SEND_API
entry.content: I have a requirement to show high importance flag in outlook which means showing red exclamation in  the outlook mail. In my abap code we are using SO_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1 , we have tried to set the priority in document_data  even then we didn't receive the high priority email with red exclamation in the email. How can i find solution for this?

entry.title: SEGW project copy error for existing OData API
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to copy an existing SEGW OData API in the HD3 (Development) system, but we are getting a runtime error.

I have attached the error details for your reference.

Kindly check and provide a solution to fix this issue.

Regards,
Lakshmi M

entry.title: Transporting OAuth Scope for v4 OData service /IWFND/V4_ADMIN
entry.content:
I have created an OData v4 service binding for my RAP service.  I can use transaction /IWFND/V4_ADMIN to publish my service and include it in a customizing request.  I create the required OAuth scope. When I use transaction SCC1N to copy my transport to another client my service is published there.  This is great because it means that my service will be published in downstream systems when the transport is imported.

My issue is with the OAuth scope. I don't see how to include this in a transport, and when I go to the 2nd client I have to create the OAuth scope again.

What is the correct procedure?  Is there a way to transport the OAuth scope, or will I have to create it in all the downstream systems?

I have reviewed SAP Help and can't find an answer to this.  Ditto with KBAs like 3304204 & 3605323.  Any assistance much appreciated

S/4HANA Private Cloud 2023 FPS03

entry.title: S/4HANA 2025 FSP01: job "/IWFND/METERING_AGG" is failing
entry.content:
Since the upgrade to S/4HANA 2025 FSP01 the job "/IWFND/METERING_AGG" is failing. 

We already implemented the SAP notes 0003646646 and 0003691927 but still the job is failing.

Why should be change the configuration under transaction /iwfnd/global_config when the same configuration is working under S/4HANA 2023???

Is there no other fix possible?

entry.title: Consultation on SAP System Integration Methods (e.g., OData, RFC, IDOC, etc.)
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

As our company chosoe SAP PCE Version,

Could you please tell us which methods can we use for systerm Integration , Such as OData, RFC, IDOC, etc.

Because we will begin a project we have to choose suitable methods, 

Seems someone have ever told us that: for SAP PCE Version, Only OData can we use for systerm Integration

While for our side we can't confirm it is correct or not, so we want to confimr with SAP.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Error 'Invalid (navigation) property 'SAP__Messages' in $select of sap.ui.model.odata.v4
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have created a custom V4 Odata service based on RAP framework and could see that the preview is working fine. When Fiori team tried building the app on the top of this V4 service, error 'Invalid (navigation) property 'SAP__Messages' 
in $select of sap.ui.model.odata.v4.ODataContextBinding: /XXXX' is coming up. 

We have tried checking in backend but don't see any error logs in /IWFND/ERROR_LOGS.

Could anyone suggest what could be the possible rootcause of the issue.

Thanks.

entry.title: Consuming API in RAP for Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using the Onpremise system where i have built RAP on top of this API for business partner.

In gateway test client service works fine and no issue in it.

I have built the class with required interface of RAP and when i run the class system goes 404 error.

Kindly suggest some idea on this. Thanks.

Issue is as below:

1. In the last statment of this code, when i debug the standard on the list of Entity set...I am not finding ENTITY as BUSINESS_PARTNER .

Am i missing anything on the below code ?

Service is already in active status.

I am not getting the response and it end up with error 404 .

cl_http_client=>create_by_destination( EXPORTING destination = 'NONE'

IMPORTING client = DATA(lo_http_client)

EXCEPTIONS argument_not_found = 1

destination_not_found = 2

destination_no_authority = 3

plugin_not_active = 4

OTHERS = 5 ).

 

 

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_client_proxy_fact=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZABC'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/' ).

 

" Navigate to the resource

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'BUSINESS_PARTNER' )->create_request_for_read( ).

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone Push Notifications not working on mobile devices
entry.content:
We have successfully deployed SAP build work zone along with the notifications feature. Everything is working as supposed except from push notifications on mobile devices, even though the notifications are visible on work zone site dashboard and via SAP mobile start application.

We can also see that all mobile devices have been registered for push notifications via mobile management console.

Please advise.

entry.title: Anyone using AI agents with SAP OData in production — what’s breaking the most right now?
entry.content:
Genuine question for anyone running SAP + AI agents in production or POC:

I've been trying to figure out the actual technical failure modes of LLM agents on SAP OData — separate from the loud Policy v4/2026 debate.

In my own testing on the ES5 sandbox, even simple business questions like "find all open sales orders for a customer" produced wrong OData URLs more often than I expected. Hallucinated field names (SalesOrderID instead of SalesOrder), wrong navigation paths, unsupported $filter syntax.

A few things I'd genuinely value input on:

1. If you've built something that works reliably against real S/4HANA (not sandbox) — what made the difference? Knowledge
graphs, fine-tuning, semantic layer, something else?

2. What's the failure mode you keep hitting that nobody's written about? The quiet ones.

3. For European customers under DSAG's flag — how are you actually thinking about Policy v4/2026 architecturally? Are you waiting, pivoting, or building something compliant?

 Trying to map the real terrain before committing more weekends to it.

entry.title: Gatewayb builder ODATA for odp throws error
entry.content:
We get an error while trying to publish and ODP Source via Gateway Builder as ODATA

Process to repeat

  • SEGW
  • create project
  • right click on Datamodel of new project
  • select "Redifine" - "ODP Extraction"
  • enter RFC Destination: DB4CLNT500, ODP Context: BW BW/4HANA, ODP Name: VP0FSACT1$F
  • click add ODP
  • click Next
  • enter empty field Service Regsitration - Description: "TEST"
  • Error appears: Make an entry in mandatory field "Description"  Message No. 00278

    Process can not be finished

Can anybody help?

entry.title: error message HTTP Open failed: HTTP Internal Error in transaction /IWFND/GW_CLIENT
entry.content:
When I try to run/test OData services.
I have 
error message HTTP Open failed: HTTP Internal Error
or
HTTP Send failed: HTTPIO_PLG_BAD_HANDLE-Fehlermeldung beim Senden der Daten.

entry.title: OPD Odata extraction using CDC and filter on initial load
entry.content:
Hello!

As you might know, the closing of ODP-RFC connections for 3rd party application has forced us to look at alternatives to our data ingestion into Azure ADF and/or databricks. 

Datasphere is the alternative, but we're also considering other options, one of which is OData ODP extraction.

At this point in time, we have quite a few big tables, with over 1 billion records in the tables.

According to many documentations, OData and ODP supports $filter, however, we noticed a behavior we're not sure how to avoid.

We are using CDS views with annotations @analytics: {dataExtraction: {enabled: true,delta.changeDataCapture: {automatic: true} so utilizing the native S4HANA 2023 on-prem functionality. 

Upon initializing the delta via OData with odata:track-changes header and $filter to avoid loading 1b records that we already have in target system, a new subscription is created in ODQMON with initial delta with filter. Using the provided deltatoken for next delta request, it actually results in yet another initial delta with filter being the exact opposite of the first filter. So we end up in the first request asking for 20 records, and second request gives us the remaining 999.9999.980 mio that we try to avoid.

 

How would you go about delta initializing with CDC without needed to fetch the whole tables?

entry.title: Force password change for Dialog user IDs on next login due to security policy change
entry.content:
Due to a change in Security policy, we have to force all the dialog user IDs to change the password in the next login. Is there any option available to force password change for Dialog user IDs on next login without a system restart?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
